title: Open the Current Errors Pop-Up From the Overall System Aveva API Page
summary: Use the Overall System Aveva API page to open the Get errors pop-up and view the current errors displayed by the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to display the current errors from the Overall System Aveva API page for review.
not_for: Interpreting the meaning of the displayed errors when the source segment does not provide error definitions
Performing corrective actions for the displayed errors
Using pages other than the Overall System Aveva API page to retrieve errors

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Overall System Aveva API page, select Get errors, and review the current errors pop-up.

safety_notes: This source segment presents the action as a pop-up viewing function and does not describe a hazardous physical action.
Do not infer corrective actions from this segment; it only covers opening and viewing the current errors pop-up.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page

access_required: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
system_preconditions: The Overall System Aveva API page is available to the user
The Get errors control is present on the page

visual_references.description: Overall System Aveva API page showing the Get errors entry among other page options.

steps.title: Open the Overall System Aveva API page
steps.purpose: Navigate to the page that contains the Get errors control.
steps.instruction: Open the Overall System Aveva API page.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System Aveva API page is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The page displays the available API page options, including Get errors.
steps.failure_condition: The Overall System Aveva API page is not accessible or does not display the expected options.

actions.label: Open API page
actions.exact_action: Open the Overall System Aveva API page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Overall System Aveva API page and the list of options that includes Get errors.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Overall System Aveva API page cannot be opened
The page does not show the expected API options including Get errors

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Overall System Aveva API page shows Reset Metrics, Reset Tipper Stats, Bag Out control, Get metrics, Zone configuration, and Get errors.

steps.title: Locate the Get errors control
steps.purpose: Identify the specific control used to open the current errors pop-up.
steps.instruction: On the Overall System Aveva API page, locate the Get errors control.
steps.expected_result: The Get errors control is identified on the page.
steps.healthy_condition: Get errors is visible as one of the available page options.
steps.failure_condition: Get errors is not visible or cannot be identified on the page.

actions.label: Find Get errors
actions.exact_action: Locate the Get errors control on the page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Get errors entry on the Overall System Aveva API page.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Get errors control is missing from the page

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Overall System Aveva API page shows Reset Metrics, Reset Tipper Stats, Bag Out control, Get metrics, Zone configuration, and Get errors.
The artifact shows the Overall System Aveva API page with options including Get errors.

steps.title: Select Get errors
steps.purpose: Open the pop-up that displays the current errors.
steps.instruction: Select Get errors to open the current errors pop-up.
steps.expected_result: A pop-up opens showing the current errors.
steps.healthy_condition: Selecting Get errors opens the pop-up successfully.
steps.failure_condition: The current errors pop-up does not appear after selecting Get errors.

actions.label: Open current errors pop-up
actions.exact_action: Select Get errors to open the current errors pop-up.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Get errors control used to launch the current errors pop-up.

stop_or_escalate_if: The current errors pop-up does not appear

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Get metrics gets all the system metrics and pops it up; Get errors is a pop up as well and OCR says it pops up the current errors.

steps.title: Review the current errors pop-up
steps.purpose: View the current errors presented by the system.
steps.instruction: Review the current errors shown in the pop-up window.
steps.expected_result: The current errors are visible for review in the pop-up window.
steps.healthy_condition: The pop-up displays the current errors.
steps.failure_condition: The pop-up opens but does not show current errors, or the errors cannot be reviewed from the displayed content.

actions.label: Review displayed errors
actions.exact_action: Review the current errors shown in the pop-up window.
